temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with short, dark hair, wearing a light blue collared shirt and a striped tie. He is seated in a black office chair, looking down with a serious and contemplative expression. The background is a simple, out-of-focus office wall. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in a stylized font. The camera remains steady, capturing his somber demeanor. A man speaks in a calm and serious tone, delivering information in a professional and measured voice. His words are clear and deliberate, as if he is reporting on a formal matter. "八分。我们收到刘警官的通知。" The camera pulls back to a wide shot, revealing a modern, high-tech control room or meeting area. The man from the previous shot is now standing at the head of a long, dark table, addressing a group of four other men who are seated. The seated men, also in light blue shirts and ties, are listening attentively, some with their hands on their chin in a thoughtful pose. The room is enclosed by glass partitions, and a television monitor on a stand to the left displays a video feed. The overall atmosphere is professional and focused. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. The audio is quiet, with no background music or sound effects, placing all the emphasis on the speaker's formal announcement.
